# Code of Conduct

## Our Pledge

We are committed to a welcoming, respectful, and constructive community for everyone participating in CreatorForge.

## Expected Behavior

- Be respectful and assume good intent.
- Focus feedback on ideas and code, not people.
- Welcome different experience levels and perspectives.
- Protect privacy and do not share another person's private information.

## Unacceptable Behavior

Harassment, discriminatory language, personal attacks, threats, doxxing, or disruptive conduct are not acceptable.

## Enforcement

Report concerns privately to the repository maintainers. Reports will be reviewed fairly and handled with appropriate action, which may include warnings or removal from participation.
